problem:
Suppose $77\cdot 88\cdot 99 \equiv n\pmod{20}$, where $0\le n<20$.

What is the value of $n$?

classified_questions.question: Can you explain the first step in solving this congruence?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: What methods do you know for solving congruences? Are there any different methods you can think of for this particular congruence?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: If you choose to reduce the factors modulo 20, how would you go about finding the appropriate reductions?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why is it possible to reduce the factors modulo 20 in this congruence? Are there any characteristics that make it suitable for this method?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: What are the reduced values of the factors? How do these values verify that your solution is correct?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you think of other types of congruences that might require similar thinking and steps in solving?
